operation.name: InsertOrUpdate
operation.sql: INSERT INTO dialog_filter_tags (user_id, enabled) values (:user_id, :enabled) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE enabled = VALUES(enabled)

operation.name: Select
operation.sql: SELECT id, user_id, enabled FROM dialog_filter_tags WHERE user_id = :user_id

operation.name: Update
operation.sql: UPDATE dialog_filter_tags SET enabled = :enabled WHERE user_id = :user_id
